title: fragariastrum alchimilloides
intro: Fragariastrum alchimilloides is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of wild chamomile or false chamomile. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its calming and soothing effects. The health benefits of Fragariastrum alchimilloides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural antispasmodic agent, which can help to alleviate muscle cramps and spasms. Herbal preparations of Fragariastrum alchimilloides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
